answers: Disaster recovery (DR) = plan to restore IT systems after a catastrophic event. Every business needs one.
RTO (Recovery Time Objective) = max acceptable downtime. RPO (Recovery Point Objective) = max acceptable data loss.
DR strategies: backup & restore (cheapest), pilot light, warm standby, multi-site active-active (most expensive/fastest).
DR tip: test your DR plan regularly! An untested plan is no plan. Run drills at least annually.
